instruction: Aapko yeh machine learning ke concept ko English se translate karna hai Hinglish (Roman) mein. Original text: 'The neural network's performance was optimized using gradient descent algorithm.'
output: Machine learning ke concept ko angrezee se hum Roman Hinglish mein translate karte hain. Anuvadit text: 'Neural network ki prashasthi ko gradient descent algorithm ka upyog karke optimize kiya gaya tha.'

instruction: Mujhe pata hai ki Artificial Intelligence (AI) ab bahut saari fields mein use ho raha hai, lekin mujhe detail mein nahi pata. Kuch main points bata do ki AI kya hai, uske types hain kya, aur India mein uska kaisa use ho raha hai? Ek chote mein summarise kardo.

summary.What is AI: AI machine ko human brain ki tarah sochne aur learn karne ki capability dena hai
summary.Types of AI: Narrow/Weak AI (e.g., Siri, Chatbots), General/Strong AI (abhi development mein), Super AI (theoretical)
summary.AI in India: Healthcare (remote diagnostics), Education (personalized learning), Economy (automation in manufacturing), Government (e-governance initiatives)

output.summary_in_hinglish: AI machines ko human ki tarah sochne ka shakti deta hai. India mein healthcare, education, economy aur government me iska bahut use ho raha hai, jaise ki remote diagnostics, personalized learning, manufacturing automation aur e-governance.

instruction: एक व्यवसाय के लिए पब्लिक क्लाउड और प्राइवेट क्लाउड के बीच चुनाव करने के लिए क्या मुख्य कारक हैं?

प्रमुख कारक: इंटरनेट बैंडविथ और लेटेंसी की समस्याएं
output.सिफारिश: सेंसिटिव डेटा वाले व्यवसायों के लिए प्राइवेट क्लाउड अधिक उपयुक्त हो सकता है, जबकि लागत की चिंता वाले और उच्च स्केलेबिलिटी वाले व्यवसाय पब्लिक क्लाउड का चयन कर सकते हैं।

instruction:
Classify the following statement regarding the Indian economy into one of the following categories: **Positive Outlook**, **Negative Outlook**, **Neutral**, or **Unrelated**. Consider the context of economic indicators, policy impact, and market trends when making your classification. 
The Statement: 'India's GDP growth is projected to rebound to 7.5% in the next fiscal year, driven by increased consumer spending and investments in renewable energy sectors.'

output.Rationale: The statement mentions a projected increase in GDP growth, driven by specific positive factors (increased consumer spending and investments in renewable energy), indicating an optimistic view of the economy's future performance.

instruction: Aapko yeh baat kaha gayi thi ki 'Bollywood ki sabse khatarnak film' kaunsi thi? Maine socha tha ki yeh 'Dangal' hogi, lekin phir meri dost ne mujhe bataya ki yeh to 'Tiger Zinda Hai' thi. Aap is vaakya ko sahi grammar ke saath ullete chalte hue angrezee mein translate kijiye (Reverse the sentence while maintaining correct grammar and translate into English).

output.Original Hinglish: Aapko yeh baat kaha gayi thi ki 'Bollywood ki sabse khatarnak film' kaunsi thi? Maine socha tha ki yeh 'Dangal' hogi, lekin phir meri dost ne mujhe bataya ki yeh to 'Tiger Zinda Hai' thi.
output.Reversed with Correct Grammar (Hinglish): Meri dost ne mujhe bataya ki yeh to 'Tiger Zinda Hai' thi, lekin Maine socha tha ki yeh 'Dangal' hogi, Aapko yeh baat kaha gayi thi ki 'Bollywood ki sabse khatarnak film' kaunsi thi?
output.English Translation (Reversed Hinglish): My friend told me it was 'Tiger Zinda Hai', but I had thought it would be 'Dangal', You were told which one was 'Bollywood's most dangerous film'?

instruction: दिवाली के बारे में एक छोटीसी जानकारी अंग्रेजी में अनुवाद करें जिसमें इसके महत्व और मनाने के तरीके शामिल हों।
output: Diwali, the festival of lights, signifies the triumph of light over darkness and good over evil. It is celebrated over five days with great fervor in India, marked by decorating homes, lighting diyas (earthen lamps), exchanging gifts, and bursting crackers, culminating in worship of Goddess Lakshmi on the main night.

instruction: Summarize the following tech news article into a single paragraph (around 150-200 words), highlighting the key innovation, its impact, and the companies involved: ... (paste article below)

output.article: Researchers from NVIDIA and MIT have collaborated on a breakthrough AI project, unveiling 'NeuroStorm' - an AI system capable of learning from unlabelled data at unprecedented speeds, up to 5 times faster than current state-of-the-art models. This innovation leverages a novel self-supervised learning technique. Potential applications include accelerated drug discovery, enhanced autonomous vehicle technology, and improved natural language processing. NVIDIA plans to integrate NeuroStorm into its upcoming GPU lineup, with preliminary availability for developers by Q3 2024.
output.summary: NVIDIA and MIT researchers have introduced 'NeuroStorm', an AI that learns from unlabelled data 5 times faster than current models through a new self-supervised technique. With potential to accelerate drug discovery, boost autonomous vehicles, and enhance NLP, NVIDIA will integrate NeuroStorm into its future GPUs, available to developers by Q3 2024.

instruction: A student scored 85% in Math, 90% in Science, and 78% in English in their semester exams. If the passing grade is 60% and the distinction grade is 90% or above, evaluate the student's performance in each subject and overall. Determine if the student is eligible for a science scholarship which requires a distinction in Science and an overall average of at least 85%.
